untranslatable_reason: The Adam & Eve Double Top pattern requires multi-bar pattern recognition (identifying formation highs/lows, confirmation lines, and breakout points across multiple candles). This cannot be expressed using single-bar indicators and point-in-time comparisons. Required: pattern detection logic for identifying double top formations, measuring formation height, and projecting targets dynamically. The measure rule target calculation (half formation height projected downward from breakout) requires state tracking and pattern-specific computations not available in the allowed indicator set.
translation_notes: Pattern requires: (1) Historical peak identification (Eve top), (2) Support level (lowest low/confirmation line), (3) Breakout detection, (4) Dynamic target calculation based on formation dimensions. These are pattern-recognition tasks requiring candlestick sequence analysis, not available via point indicators. Success rate 69% and average decline 19% are historical statistics provided by Bulkowski but cannot be encoded as executable rules. Stop placement marked as AUTHOR_SILENT in source.
